items.reviewerNotes: Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source MCQ matches q0420 semantically (renew license before expiration). Master correct = '90 days', which corresponds to source option C (90 jours).

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Visual shows trunk-open indicator and source asserts 'Yes'. Top machine q0554 exists but its stored correct row is 'Wrong' (conflicts with visual/source). Conflict between source/visual and master candidate — keep unresolved for human adjudication. Rejected top matcher: Top machine match q0554 marks the statement as Wrong while visual tags and source indicate trunk-open; candidate conflict requires human review.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Statement 'Do not hang or place items close to front/rear windows...' matches q0311 (Right). Source Yes corresponds to Right -> source option A.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Dashboard image shows airbag symbol; steady airbag light commonly indicates airbag system fault. No clear existing qid in shortlist matching this exact prompt, so recommend create new with correct answer = B (airbag system failed).

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Indicator graphic ambiguous (curved arrow inside car). Candidate matches disagree (front fan / internal/external circulation). Image semantics unclear; need human review to map to source options.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Sign is a red-circle dimensional restriction showing '3 m' — meaning width limited to 3 m. No exact existing qid reliably matches this 3 m width sign in candidates (some candidates refer to 3.5 m), so create new; correct = D (largeur limitée à 3m).
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Road-marking image corresponds to 'central circle' meaning; q0803's correct text = central circle, which maps to source option C (cercle central).
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source states using falsified/altered driving license -> 12-point penalty. q0339 explicitly matches that statement (Right). Source Yes -> option A.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Image (POV intersection) does not show a clear 'no right turn' sign; candidate matches are mixed and top candidate prompts differ. Ambiguity between visual and candidate prompts — keep unresolved for human check.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: POV scene matches q0228 scenario where overtaking from both sides is not allowed; q0228's correctRow = Wrong => source answer No (option B).

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image clearly shows a black car pictogram inside a red prohibition circle — matches prohibitive sign. Candidate q0714 (prohibitive sign) is a direct semantic match; source option B = 'Panneau d'interdiction'.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Statement concerns switching between high/low beams at an unlit intersection. Candidate matches conflict and signal analyses show negation/obligation mismatch; the truth/value of the French statement is ambiguous given available candidates and OCR gloss — cannot safely map to an existing qid.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Yellow hatched (filled) central marking — options provided are phrased inconsistently and candidate qbank items disagree on exact meaning (approaching obstacle vs narrowing/etc.). Visual + option wording do not allow a confident existing-qid match.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Question asks which light to use on narrow roads/bridges at night when meeting vehicles; correct is low beam. Candidate q0466 matches and its correct option (low beam) corresponds to source option B 'feux de croisement'.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Yellow triangular sign with train pictogram indicates a railway crossing, but options distinguish manned/unmanned/multi-crossing and candidates disagree. Visual alone doesn't disambiguate manned vs unmanned — cannot safely approve an existing qid.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image and notes indicate a triangular warning showing narrowing from the right; candidate q0731 maps to 'road narrows on the right side' and source option B matches that meaning.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Question asks which indicator to use when moving into the left lane; candidate q0479's correct answer is 'turn on the left-turn signal in advance' which corresponds to source option C 'clignotant gauche'.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: POV scene at a fork/entrance ramp — which light to use (left/right/hazard/headlights) depends on intended manoeuvre. Image and candidate signals conflict; insufficient unambiguous context to approve an existing qid or pick a source option.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Asks which part the headrest protects in a collision; candidate q0625 correct answer is 'neck'. Source option C = 'le cou' (neck) matches the master correct answer.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Blue rectangular sign with white left arrow indicates one-way to the left. Candidate q0817 corresponds to 'left one-way road'; master correct maps to source option A 'voie à sens unique vers la gauche'.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source asks if an illegally assembled vehicle may be driven if deemed safe; q0217 has the same wording and the correct answer is 'Wrong/No' → source B. Rejected top matcher: Top machine match (q0073) is about lane-change signals and is semantically different; q0217 (rank 2) is a direct semantic match.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Source correct = 'ralentir' (slow down). Image of police hand signals present but top candidate q0678/q0899/q0692 disagree on the intended meaning; no single existing qid clearly matches 'slow down'.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Lever image (left stalk) could control indicators, lights, fog lights or high beam depending on icon; top candidates conflict (turn signals, master lights, fog). Insufficient clear visual semantics to map to an existing qid or pick an option.

Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Source says correct = 'céder le passage au véhicule de gauche' (give way to vehicle from left). This conflicts with common priority rules and machine candidates (which prefer slow down or yield to left/right inconsistently). Candidate matches are weak — keep unresolved and flag high risk for possible extraction/localization error.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows rear-end collision; source answer = 'le véhicule de derrière n'a pas gardé ses distances' matches q0424 correctOption 'not maintain a safe distance' (master key D) — localized option A corresponds to that meaning.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Triangular yellow sign with house/tree = village/town warning. q0667 prompt and correctOptionText = 'village or town' → localized option C matches.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Dashboard icon in image appears to be an oil-can (oil pressure) not a fuel-low symbol; source statement ('indique que la quantité d'essence est insuffisante') is incorrect → correct = No. No existing qid clearly corresponds to this exact fuel-vs-oil indicator pair in candidates, so create new question. Rejected top matcher: Top machine matches refer to seatbelt/oil/handbrake indicators (q0571, q0527, q0534) but none clearly represent the fuel-low vs oil symbol difference; no safe existing match.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Sign shows left and right arrows crossed out = 'no turning left or right'. q0716 has master meaning 'no left or right turn' (master correctOptionText) which corresponds to localized option D. Rejected top matcher: Top machine match (q0669) suggested 'no U-turn' which is inconsistent with the image; q0716 is a nearer semantic match.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Embedded image of control lever/wiper; source states pushing switch up/down activates windshield wipers. q0530 prompt 'Move the switch up and down, and the windshield wipers are activated.' matches — answer = Yes (A). Rejected top matcher: Top machine match was q0529 (turn signal statement); q0530 (present among candidates) is the correct semantic match for wiper operation.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source statement 'choose a parking lot when parked for a long time' maps directly to q0015 which has same meaning — answer = Yes (A).
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image clearly shows an ignition key labeled START; source option C = 'contact-démarreur' (ignition starter) matches master q0608 meaning.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Road marking in red circle denotes a bus stop; source option C 'stationnement d'autobus' matches master q0893 ('public bus stop').

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Image is the dead-end ('route barrée') sign (blue rectangular T with red bar). Top candidate q0764 indicates intersection (mismatch); no clear existing qid for dead-end in shortlist, so create new. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate (q0764) indicates an intersection, not a dead-end sign; candidate set does not match source meaning.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Statement about reducing speed on a slope to 'maintain driving force' is ambiguous compared to existing items about shifting to lower gear; machine candidates similar but not identical. Needs human/legal/technical verification.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows fuel gauge (E/F and gas pump icon); source option D = fuel gauge matches master q0600.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Gauge shows C/H with needle (engine coolant temperature); source option C = water temperature indicator; matches master q0610.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Triangular warning sign with downward arrow denotes steep descent; source option C 'descente abrupte' corresponds to master q0928 ('steep downhill road'). Top candidate favored curve sign, but q0928 better matches image. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate (q0711) describes sharp curve; q0928 more closely matches a steep downhill sign present in candidate list.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Prompt and options match master q0119; correct behavior is to slow or stop and yield (source option A).
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Statement that traffic signals include lights, signs, markings and police gestures matches master q0328 (True). Source 'Yes' is option A.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Question asks when police may suspend license; 'état d'ivresse' (drunkenness) is the correct legal reason. Master q0472 contains 'driving after drinking' (matches meaning). Source letter A corresponds to that meaning. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate (q0143) is unrelated to the prompt; q0472 (present in shortlist) matches the 'drunk driving' case.

Codex low-risk createNewQuestion: Source asks which action to take to avoid a tire puncture; correct meaning is 'check your tires periodically' (French B). Top candidate q0125 is about the wrong measure (mismatch). No existing candidate clearly matches the positive phrasing, so create new. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate q0125 asks for the 'wrong' measure (opposite intent), not the positive action in the source.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source statement matches q0979 ('must follow driving manners and must not drive in a way that is forceful or takes risks'). The correct ROW answer is Right/True. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate q0218 is unrelated (traffic signal lane restriction); q0979 is a closer semantic match. Local Yes/No answer key set to A from master ROW Right/True.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source: probationary drivers must display a probation mark on rear of vehicle — directly matches q0314. ROW answer is Right/True. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate q0075 (U-turn guidance) does not match; q0314 is the precise existing item. Local Yes/No answer key set to A from master ROW Right/True.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Top candidate q0450 asks what additional sanction applies for driving an illegally assembled vehicle; master correct is 'license revoked'. That meaning corresponds to French option C (retrait définitif du permis). Good match but translations/option-order differences warrant medium risk.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source: when stopping briefly at roadside you must not stop opposite traffic or double-park — matches q0158 'not allowed to stop in the opposite direction or in parallel'. That meaning maps to French option C.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Statement claims a forged vehicle inspection certificate 'only' incurs a fine. Legal consequences likely larger; candidate list does not contain a clear exact match. Avoid approving or creating without authoritative legal mapping.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source: drive on right, don't occupy opposite lane when turning; left turns wide, right turns small — directly matches q0047. ROW answer is Right/True. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate q0059 (sharp curve guidance) is related but q0047 is a closer semantic match to the precise phrasing about turning. Local Yes/No answer key set to A from master ROW Right/True.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source states that driving without a license leads to legal liability — matches q0299. ROW answer is Right/True. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate q0022 (snow driving guidance) is unrelated; q0299 is the correct existing match. Local Yes/No answer key set to A from master ROW Right/True.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source: when accident causes property damage and parties agree, they should photograph or mark scene — directly matches q0313. ROW answer is Right/True. Local Yes/No answer key set to A from master ROW Right/True.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Question asks when police may immobilize a vehicle. q0430 covers conditions for detention; master correct is 'no label of insurance' which corresponds to French option C (no insurance sticker on windshield). Source's extracted key (B) conflicts with master meaning — mapping chosen to match master semantics (C). Rejected top matcher: Top candidate q0379 (documents to carry) differs; q0430 is the semantically matching master item. Also source's extracted key conflicts with master's correct option mapping.
